title: preview screen, the "J" is displayed as a paragraph.

posts.author: daito (AYA)
posts.cookedHtml: On the monday.com preview screen, the “J” is displayed as a paragraph. This happens when I use Docutus, but when I asked the Docutus developers, they told me that this issue seems to occur when opening an Excel file on monday.com. Please look into it.
